content.en:
The Sixty Tribulation Tribulation Beasts were nothing, and Qi Yang could easily kill them.

However, it is not easy to find the Sixty Tribulation Beasts.

Even if he had the strength of a top fifth-rank invincible, he didn't dare to look for the beast, otherwise he would have died a long time ago.

And Ye Tian handed over so many sixty tribulation blood and bones, obviously killing a sixty tribulation beast.

Although Qi Yang was shocked by Ye Tian's harvest, he didn't ask, after all, Ye Tian was able to kill the Sixty Tribulation Beasts, no matter what the situation was, it was Ye Tian's own business, he was not familiar with Ye Tian, so naturally he wouldn't ask.

Subsequently, he handled the task submission procedures for Ye Tian.

Sixteen copies of the Sixty Tribulation Tribulation Blood plus fifteen Sixty Tribulation Bones brought Ye Tian a total of 30,000 contribution points, which were not low, because a top-grade Tribulation Stone only needed fifty contribution points.

As you can imagine, 30,000 contribution value is an exaggerated value.

Originally, Ye Tian's contribution value was only more than 100 points, and he still obtained the contribution value by handing in a blood robbery, but now he suddenly has an additional contribution value of 30,000 points, which is enough to exchange for a large number of good things.

In fact, if other members of the Heavenly Wind Sea have obtained the blood robbery and bone robbery, they will rarely take it out in exchange for contribution points, and they will use the blood robbery and bone robbery that are useful to themselves, and they can also give it to their juniors if they are useless to themselves.

It is absolutely extremely rare for a sixth-rank invincible person like Ye Tian to hand over all the blood and bones of the sixty tribulations.

"I want to exchange for the best robber stone, is there any here?"

Ye Tian asked.

Qi Yang checked it and said, "There are top-grade robbery stones, but there are only six!"

"It's all exchanged!" Ye Tian said.

A superb stone contribution value is 50, and six pieces only need 300 contribution points.

But in fact, these six top-grade robbery stones helped Ye Tian far more than the sixty tribulation blood, but others couldn't use the top-grade robbery stones, which made the top-grade robbery stones almost uncared about.

After Ye Tian exchanged for the six Superb Tribulation Stones, he left here and returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

In the following days, Ye Tian's copy body used the best robbery stone to cultivate the Ten Thousand Sources Return to the Ruins, and improved the Ten Thousand Sources Return to the Ruins step by step, making this invincible body robbery method extremely suitable for himself.

On the other hand, he would occasionally let the replica body find a suitable raider to hunt.

Time flickered, and a dark time passed.

In this dark time, Ye Tian hunted a total of six robbery beasts, and the harvest was naturally very large, and he also went to the Tianlin Realm again, exchanging hundreds of top-grade robbery stones from the Heavenly Wind Sea.

At Ye Tian's request, these robbery stones were all from different exotic worlds, so they contained the rules of different exotic worlds, which met the requirements of cultivating the Ten Thousand Sources to Return to the Ruins.

After all, the invincible body of Wanyuan Guiru needs to be tempered by the rules of different exotic heaven and earth rules to make this invincible body progress.

Stone robbery is also different from stone robbery, so it can be used as an alternative to blood robbery.

Through these hundreds of top-grade robbery stones, coupled with the copying body, Ye Tian perfected the invincible body robbery method of Wanyuan Returning to the Ruins to the first level of perfection.

If it were someone else, there would be no way to perfect this invincible method of robbing the body.

Fortunately, Ye Tian possessed the Secret Technique of Transforming the Tribulation and the Eternal Talent Tribulation, otherwise, if he just absorbed and refined the Tribulation Blood, he was afraid that he would need a large amount of Tribulation Blood to be able to do this.

I have to say that if he wants to cultivate the top invincible body, he really needs too many resources, and he also has to repair the defects of the Ten Thousand Sources Returning to the Ruins, and the consumption of resources is even more than ten times.

One by one, the best robbery stones were consumed and refined by Ye Tian, and finally on this day, Ye Tian's body successfully cultivated the Wanyuan Guiru to the first consummation realm, and there was no flaw, but the perfect invincible robbery body first consummation.

The general Invincible Body Raiding Method can only make a Sixth-Rank Invincible Invincible Three times stronger than a Sixth-Rank Invincible Warrior who has not cultivated the Invincible Body Raider, but the top-notch Invincible Body-Raiding Ten Thousand Sources Return to the Ruins is nine times stronger.

More importantly, Ye Tian laid a supreme foundation.

Once Ye Tian stepped into the realm of a fifth-rank invincible, and then cultivated the Ten Thousand Sources to the second consummation realm, and at the same time it was nine times invincible, such a superposition might not reach the level of ninety-nine eighty-one times, but at least it could reach the level of forty or fifty times.

Invincible robbery body is forty or fifty times more powerful, what kind of concept is this, the same level can easily kill those ordinary invincible people in seconds.

However, if the top invincible body is flawed, if others can't solve it, it will be difficult to cultivate to the first level of consummation, and if you cultivate to the late stage, you may not be able to advance an inch after cultivating to the third level of small success.

At that time, each level of cultivation will only reach a small level or entry, and it will only be a little bit stronger than the ordinary invincible body robbery method, and it will not be of much use.

But Ye Tian can perfect the top invincible robbing body, and every weight is perfect, once it is superimposed to the realm of the first-class invincible, his strength is afraid that he can kill those first-class invincible people in seconds, and truly become invincible among the invincible, and even cross the level to fight with the supreme, it is not impossible.

......

"The invincible body robbery has cultivated to the first level of consummation, and my current combat power has actually surpassed many fifth-rank invincible people, it's time to try to create the invincible ancestral technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian spent a little contribution value to exchange a secret information for comprehending invincible skills from Tianfeng Hai, this information is very comprehensive, and it can completely allow Ye Tian to take many paths.

No matter which Exotic Heaven and Earth or the Eternal Heaven and Earth Tianlin Realm are sixth-rank invincibles, if they want to be promoted to fifth-rank invincibles, they must comprehend invincible skills such as invincible ancestral skills, invincible combat skills, etc., the names are different, but the ontology is the same.

The Invincible Skill is an application of the rules of Eternal Heaven and Earth, a higher-level rule that overrides the rules of ordinary Exotic Heaven and Earth.

Under normal circumstances, it is almost impossible for a fifth-class invincible person to comprehend the invincible technique.

It was precisely because of this that countless sixth-rank invincible people were trapped at this level and could not be promoted to the fifth-rank invincible realm.

There are three more common ways for a sixth-class invincible to be promoted to a fifth-class invincible, the first way is to stay in the eternal world through a long period of enlightenment, as long as there is potential, one day he will understand the rules of the eternal world, so as to create an invincible skill.

The second way is to comprehend the rules of the eternal heaven and earth through the rules of the eternal heaven and earth, so as to create an invincible skill, this way to comprehend the speed of comprehension, as long as the talent is not bad, almost can create an invincible skill.

However, the rule heavenly objects of the Eternal Heaven and Earth are too precious for ordinary invincibles to get at all, and only those powerful saint-level forces have rule heavenly objects, and there is more than one.

The third method is to refine the Eternal Rule Pill, which is the Supreme or a few first-class invincible people through alchemy, using countless rare and precious things to smelt the rules of heaven and earth of the eternal heaven and earth, forcibly integrating a wisp of the rules of heaven and earth into a pill, turning into the Eternal Rule Pill, after refining the Eternal Rule Pill, you can master that Eternal Heaven and Earth rule, so as to slowly create an invincible skill.

This third method is also the most commonly used method in the Tianlin Realm, countless sixth-rank invincible people want to obtain an Eternal Rule Pill, and for this reason, they have accumulated countless years of resources to purchase the Eternal Rule Pill.

Using the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal to measure the value of the Eternal Rule Pill, that is, it is worth 10 million Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, which is not something that ordinary invincibles can take out.

However, Ye Tian would not choose the third method, because although the third method could be promoted to a fifth-rank invincible, it would be a little difficult to progress in the future, far inferior to the second method.

If it was before, Ye Tian naturally couldn't be promoted to the invincible in the second way, but now that he has joined the Tianfeng Sea, and the Tianfeng Sea has regular celestial objects, he only needs to pay a certain contribution value to comprehend the rule celestial things.

This is also one of the reasons why countless invincible people want to join the Saint-level forces.
